Class NativeMulticoreLinearAlgebraProvider

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.technical.algorithm.linearalgebra.NativeMulticoreLinearAlgebraProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>, AlgorithmProvider
@AutoService({LinearAlgebraProvider.class,AlgorithmProvider.class}) public class NativeMulticoreLinearAlgebraProvider extends Object implements LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>
Native multicore linear algebra provider using BLAS/LAPACK.

Delegates to native BLAS for RealDoubleMatrix operations and falls back to CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider for generic operations.

Since:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
